sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81196" key="periglupte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περι-γλυπτέον</orth>, <sense id="n81196.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must cut away</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:2:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
